# MApper
> Desktop LCA + DSM + pLCA + AESA software for absolute sustainability assessment

## Docs
- Architecture: see CLAUDE.md in this repo
- API: FastAPI auto-docs at /docs when running
- Tests: pytest tests/ in mapper-backend/

## Stack
Frontend: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Zustand, Recharts
Backend: FastAPI, Python 3.11, Brightway2, UMFPACK
Database: ecoinvent 3.10 (user-provided)

## Contact
Leonardo Ferhati — leo_frht@icloud.com
Website: mapper.leonardoferhati.com
